_source: TTB Public COLA Registry, TTB ID 25136001000248 (approved 2025-06-09)
_note: Front + back pair. Demonstrates multi-image verification: brand/varietal are on the FRONT, the government warning is on the BACK. Upload both panels together. On the back, OCR reads the warning in ALL CAPS -> REVIEW (bold needs human confirmation).
government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
